overall_process_summary: 2 online assessments + 2 tech interviews + 1 HR round, interviews via Unstop
round_1_topics: Aptitude; CS fundamentals MCQs; 3 coding Qs (arrays/strings/stacks/queues/BFS-DFS)
round_2_topics: 2 medium coding Qs - Trees and Graphs (BFS/DFS)
round_3_topics: Project deep-dive; deployment/DevOps/Azure; Docker; JWT; indexing; MVC; SQL queries; DSA (merge sort, sliding window, cycle detection)
round_4_topics: Spring Boot annotations; REST API methods; polymorphism; ArrayList vs LinkedList; indexing; duplicate-removal approaches
round_5_topics: Self-intro; internship impact; career track (Cloud); situational prioritization question
tips_advice: Explain every resume technology in depth; practice multi-approach trade-off explanations; HR round also probes career direction
